name: Grangers' Corn Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Sour milk or butter milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar and lard until smooth.
2. Add the eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients (corn meal, flour, salt, baking powder, and baking soda) alternately with the sour milk or butter milk.
4. Mix until just combined; do not overmix.
5. Pour the batter into greased layer cake tins.
6. Bake in a moderate oven at 350°F for about 20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean and the edges are golden brown.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly before serving.
